summary: Successfully added protection mechanisms to prevent history loss: GitHub workflow for commit count monitoring, sync protocol documentation, and pre-push validation script.
learnings: GitHub workflow pattern for commit count monitoring can detect potential force push incidents
Pre-push validation script provides safety net by comparing local/remote states before pushing
Documentation of sync protocol helps establish clear workflow for multi-machine collaboration
notes_for_orchestrator: All protection mechanisms in place and tested. D3.1 should be able to validate end-to-end workflow including these new safeguards. The sync check script properly handles the N5OS Ode directory path and provides useful feedback.
